title: Mob Health
description: A plugin that displays the health count of a mob above their head
body:
# ❤️ Mob Health
Changes the mobs name to display it's health amount.
Supports custom mob names after you renamed a mob.

## ⚙️ Settings
- Skyblock Level Prefix (enabled/disabled)
- Show names through blocks (enabled/disabled)
- Disable mob name (enabled/disabled)
- Name color ("&c")
- Edit prefix and suffix for both profiles
- Change colors of the health displayed (high / mid / low HP colors)

## 👤 Profiles
- Skyblock
- Symbols

### 🏝️ Skyblock
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa91de2c5b2a4a43d32615d5254957a76d59cd04.png)

### 🟩 Symbols
